subject: Poliwag — round blue tadpole Pokemon with a spiral pattern visible through its translucent belly, large blue eyes, and a small curling tail, floating in shallow water
description: A round, smooth-bodied blue tadpole creature occupies the center of a light blue watery background. Its most distinctive feature is the visible clockwise spiral pattern on its white belly, visible through translucent skin. Two large round eyes sit atop the head. A short curved tail extends behind it. The overall color field is cool blue and white. The scene is calm and minimal — just the creature against a simple aquatic backdrop with no complex environment.
foreground: round blue tadpole-like creature with spiral-patterned belly and large eyes
background: plain pale blue gradient suggesting shallow water
